known_facts: G1 benchmark (12 queries) was all CTX-domain: BM25, recall, hooks — same domain as commits
BM25 reranking +47.6% on CTX-domain benchmark may be inflated by domain overlap
n=15 recency baseline Recall@7=0.292; n=30+BM25 Recall@7=0.431
Deep grep gave 0 additional improvement because relevant commits are omc-live iter commits filtered by _OMC_ITER_RE
Semantic rerank gave 0 additional improvement because CTX is single-domain (BM25 already captures signal)
Overfitting hypothesis: BM25 boosts CTX keywords but may NOT generalize to cross-domain queries

uncertain.question: Does BM25 reranking HURT precision for cross-domain queries (false positive boost)?
Does n=30+BM25 generalize to external repos (Flask, Django)?
